p.c: function[T0: Mul](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 = mul_commute[T0](x0, x1) }[M](a, b)

function[T0: Mul](x0: T0) { (forall(x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 } and forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { x0 * (x2 * x3) = x0 * x2 * x3 } and forall(x4: T0, x5: T0) { x4 * (x5 * x0) = x4 * x5 * x0 }) = is_mul_central[T0](x0) }[M](z)
not is_mul_central(z) or (forall(x0: M) { x0 * z = z * x0 } and forall(x1: M, x2: M) { z * (x1 * x2) = z * x1 * x2 } and forall(x3: M, x4: M) { x3 * (x4 * z) = x3 * x4 * z })

(forall(x0: M) { not is_mul_central(z) or z * x0 = x0 * z })

not is_mul_central(z) or forall(x0: M, x1: M) { z * (x0 * x1) = z * x0 * x1 } = true
(forall(x0: M) { not is_mul_central(z) or forall(x1: M) { z * (x0 * x1) = z * x0 * x1 } = true })

not is_mul_central(z) or forall(x0: M, x1: M) { x0 * (x1 * z) = x0 * x1 * z } = true
(forall(x0: M) { not is_mul_central(z) or forall(x1: M) { x0 * (x1 * z) = x0 * x1 * z } = true })
(forall(x0: M) { forall(x1: M) { x0 * (x1 * z) = x0 * x1 * z } = true })
(forall(x0: M, x1: M) { x0 * x1 * z = x0 * (x1 * z) })
(forall(x0: M, x1: M) { not is_mul_central(z) or x0 * x1 * z = x0 * (x1 * z) })

(forall(x0: M) { x0 * z = z * x0 } = true)
(forall(x0: M, x1: M) { z * (x0 * x1) = z * x0 * x1 } = true)
(forall(x0: M, x1: M) { x0 * (x1 * z) = x0 * x1 * z } = true)

(forall(x1: M) { x1 * z = z * x1 } = true)
(forall(x0: M) { z * x0 = x0 * z })

p.c: function[T0: Mul](x0: T0) { (forall(x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 } and forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { x0 * (x2 * x3) = x0 * x2 * x3 } and forall(x4: T0, x5: T0) { x4 * (x5 * x0) = x4 * x5 * x0 }) = is_mul_central[T0](x0) }[M](z)

function[T0: Mul](x0: T0) { (forall(x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 } and forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { x0 * (x2 * x3) = x0 * x2 * x3 } and forall(x4: T0, x5: T0) { x4 * (x5 * x0) = x4 * x5 * x0 }) = is_mul_central[T0](x0) }[M](z)
